description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage using the docker:stable Docker image and a docker:dind service. Define variables DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375, NAME=cep-cataloger, and OWNER=interscity/interscity-platform. In the build job (named build, stage build) run a before_script that logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, then execute the script commands docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY/$OWNER/$NAME . and docker push $CI_REGISTRY/$OWNER/$NAME, and configure the job to run only on the master branch.
